description_long: This is a small, single-story wooden cabin with a rectangular footprint and a dark gable roof. The exterior walls are clad in horizontal wood paneling, giving it a natural and rustic appearance. The front facade features a set of double glass doors, while the side has a single entry door and several rectangular windows with white frames. The roof is simple and overhangs slightly, providing some shelter to the walls below. Decorative elements are minimal, with a small green emblem or plaque visible on two sides. The cabin appears well-suited for residential or recreational use in an urban or park setting.
description: A compact wooden cabin with a dark gable roof, double glass doors at the front, and several white-framed windows and a side entry door.
description_view_0: Front view showing double glass doors centered on the facade and a small green emblem on the lower right.
description_view_1: Side view with a single entry door on the right, two rectangular windows, and a green emblem beneath the windows.
description_view_2: Rear view with a single small window offset to the left and plain wood paneling.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with two rectangular windows and a green emblem beneath them, no visible door.
attribute_roof_type: gable roof with moderate overhangs and a dark, likely shingled surface
attribute_window_arrangement: Four rectangular windows with white frames: two grouped together on one long side, one single window on the rear, and one single window on the side with the entry door; arrangement is asymmetrical
attribute_door_placement: One set of double glass doors centered on the front facade and one single entry door on the right side of the cabin
